news.title:
STL Digital, a Sterlite Tech arm, launches Securennov cybersecurity suite targeting enterprises with AI-driven analytics and 5S Framework.
Sterlite Tech shares fell 2.7% to ₹187.95 on NSE. STL Digital faces competition from giants like Infosys, Wipro, and Fortinet.
news.summary:
STL Digital, a Sterlite Tech arm, launches Securennov cybersecurity suite targeting enterprises with AI-driven analytics and 5S Framework.
Sterlite Tech shares fell 2.7% to ₹187.95 on NSE. STL Digital faces competition from giants like Infosys, Wipro, and Fortinet.

news.title:
Sterlite Technologies held its EGM on March 4, 2026, via VC with 48 members attending.
Key resolutions included altering Articles of Association and issuing convertible warrants to Twin Star Overseas Ltd.
news.summary:
Sterlite Technologies held its EGM on March 4, 2026, via VC with 48 members attending.
Key resolutions included altering Articles of Association and issuing convertible warrants to Twin Star Overseas Ltd.

news.title:
Sterlite Technologies issued an addendum to the EGM notice dated Feb 9, 2026.
Valuation report revised; no change in floor price (Rs.108.15) or issue price (Rs.110).
news.summary:
Sterlite Technologies issued an addendum to the EGM notice dated Feb 9, 2026.
Valuation report revised; no change in floor price (Rs.108.15) or issue price (Rs.110).

news.title:
Sterlite Technologies to participate in Ambit GPC UPNEXT 2026 on Feb 17, 2026.
The physical investor-analyst meet in Mumbai will cover business updates and industry insights.
news.summary:
Sterlite Technologies to participate in Ambit GPC UPNEXT 2026 on Feb 17, 2026.

news.title:
Sterlite Tech shares hit a 52-week high of ₹163.4, surging 70% in a month.
Nuvama maintains a 'buy' rating with a ₹200 target, citing growth momentum and easing tariffs.
news.summary:
Sterlite Tech shares hit a 52-week high of ₹163.4, surging 70% in a month.
Nuvama maintains a 'buy' rating with a ₹200 target, citing growth momentum and easing tariffs.

news.title:
Sterlite Technologies to hold EGM on March 4, 2026, via video conferencing.
Company plans to issue 453M warrants at ₹110 each, convertible to equity shares.
news.summary:
Sterlite Technologies to hold EGM on March 4, 2026, via video conferencing.
Company plans to issue 453M warrants at ₹110 each, convertible to equity shares.

news.title:
Sterlite Technologies' board to meet on Feb 7, 2026, to discuss raising funds via preferential issue.
Trading window for designated persons closed from now until Feb 9, 2026, per SEBI rules.
news.summary:
Sterlite Technologies' board to meet on Feb 7, 2026, to discuss raising funds via preferential issue.
Trading window for designated persons closed from now until Feb 9, 2026, per SEBI rules.

news.title:
India's telecom exports gain edge post India-US trade deal lowering tariffs from 50% to 18%.
Key exporters like Himachal Futuristic and Sterlite Tech may benefit from enhanced competitiveness.
news.summary:
India's telecom exports gain edge post India-US trade deal lowering tariffs from 50% to 18%.
Key exporters like Himachal Futuristic and Sterlite Tech may benefit from enhanced competitiveness.

news.title:
Sterlite Technologies surged 10.3% intraday on 3 Feb 2026, hitting Rs 129.
The stock outperformed its sector and market, showing strong trading momentum.
news.summary:
Sterlite Technologies surged 10.3% intraday on 3 Feb 2026, hitting Rs 129.
The stock outperformed its sector and market, showing strong trading momentum.

news.title: Sterlite Tech's MD Ankit Agarwal states data centers will drive 30% revenue mix in 12-18 months.
news.summary: Sterlite Tech's MD Ankit Agarwal states data centers will drive 30% revenue mix in 12-18 months.

news.title:
Sterlite Technologies warns of germanium supply risks due to China's export restrictions, impacting optical fibre costs.
STL sees US, Europe driving demand; aims to mitigate US tariffs and expand revenue from data centres and enterprises.
news.summary:
Sterlite Technologies warns of germanium supply risks due to China's export restrictions, impacting optical fibre costs.
STL sees US, Europe driving demand; aims to mitigate US tariffs and expand revenue from data centres and enterprises.

news.title:
US tariffs have hurt Indian cable and telecom firms like Sterlite Tech, HFCL, Polycab, Havells, and RR Kabel, impacting margins and exports amid a US data centre boom.
Companies aim to mitigate tariffs by localizing production or diversifying markets; demand remains strong in the US for data centres and broadband infrastructure.
news.summary:
US tariffs have hurt Indian cable and telecom firms like Sterlite Tech, HFCL, Polycab, Havells, and RR Kabel, impacting margins and exports amid a US data centre boom.
Companies aim to mitigate tariffs by localizing production or diversifying markets; demand remains strong in the US for data centres and broadband infrastructure.

news.title:
Sterlite Technologies held its Q3 FY26 earnings call on Jan 23, 2026.
The audio recording of the call is available on the company's website under the Financial Results section.
news.summary:
Sterlite Technologies held its Q3 FY26 earnings call on Jan 23, 2026.
The audio recording of the call is available on the company's website under the Financial Results section.

news.title:
Sterlite Technologies confirms full utilization of NCD proceeds with no deviations.
No new NCDs were issued during the quarter ended December 31, 2025, per SEBI regulations.
news.summary:
Sterlite Technologies confirms full utilization of NCD proceeds with no deviations.
No new NCDs were issued during the quarter ended December 31, 2025, per SEBI regulations.

news.title: Sterlite Tech's Q3 revenue rises to ₹12.6B, up from ₹9.98B YoY.
news.summary: Sterlite Tech's Q3 revenue rises to ₹12.6B, up from ₹9.98B YoY.

news.title:
STL reported Q3 FY'26 revenues of INR 1,257 Cr, EBITDA of INR 129 Cr, growing 26% and 16% YoY.
Operational EBITDA margin improved for the 5th quarter, aided by higher-margin products and US market contributions.
news.summary:
STL reported Q3 FY'26 revenues of INR 1,257 Cr, EBITDA of INR 129 Cr, growing 26% and 16% YoY.
Operational EBITDA margin improved for the 5th quarter, aided by higher-margin products and US market contributions.

news.title:
Sterlite Tech partners with Colt Technology for Multi Core Fibre trials in London.
Achieved 800 Gbps over 9 km & 63 km, validating MCF as cost-efficient for next-gen networks.
news.summary:
Sterlite Tech partners with Colt Technology for Multi Core Fibre trials in London.
Achieved 800 Gbps over 9 km & 63 km, validating MCF as cost-efficient for next-gen networks.

news.title:
Sterlite Technologies to hold board meeting on Jan 23, 2026, to review Q3 FY26 financial results.
Trading window for Sterlite shares remains closed from Jan 1 to Jan 25, 2026, per insider trading norms.
news.summary:
Sterlite Technologies to hold board meeting on Jan 23, 2026, to review Q3 FY26 financial results.
Trading window for Sterlite shares remains closed from Jan 1 to Jan 25, 2026, per insider trading norms.

news.title:
Sterlite Technologies' (NSE:STLTECH) share price dropped 50% over five years, with a 31% TSR loss despite dividends.
Revenue declined 2.2% annually over five years; recent 14% one-year TSR hints at potential business turnaround.
news.summary:
Sterlite Technologies' (NSE:STLTECH) share price dropped 50% over five years, with a 31% TSR loss despite dividends.
Revenue declined 2.2% annually over five years; recent 14% one-year TSR hints at potential business turnaround.

news.title:
CRISIL reaffirmed Sterlite Technologies' AA rating with a Negative outlook.
Rated bank loan facilities reduced from Rs.5767 Cr to Rs.4045 Cr.
news.summary:
CRISIL reaffirmed Sterlite Technologies' AA rating with a Negative outlook.
Rated bank loan facilities reduced from Rs.5767 Cr to Rs.4045 Cr.
